hero_subtitle: One-on-one sessions with a coach, or small-group practice with members at your level. Sessions in packs, paid upfront. You keep your spot.
note_1on1_rest: Just you and your coach. Every minute on what you need.
note_group_rest: 2–5 members per group. Lower cost. More voices in the room.
note_corporate: Tailored programs · Monthly reporting · Enterprise billing · A success manager you'll know
hero_pricing_copy: Pick the pack that fits. Full comparison below.
hero_pricing_custom_copy: See the tiers. Request a plan for your team size.
status_error: Something went wrong. Try again in a moment.
pricing_subtitle_individual: Sessions in packs. The more reps you commit to, the lower the per-session price.
pricing_subtitle_corporate: Pilot, team, or company. Built around what your people actually need to say.
estimator_text: A rough number for your team size. The real plan comes back with your tailored proposal.
estimator_disclaimer: An indicative number only. The real one depends on format, duration, and scope.
how_step1_desc: Choose the format and the size that fits how you want to practice.
how_step2_desc: We pick a coach for what you actually need to say. Not random. Chosen.
how_step3_desc: One or two sessions a week. Real conversations every time. The shift comes inside a month.
compare_empty: Every pack includes a coach picked for you, live sessions, and notes after every one.
faq1_q: Can I switch between one-on-one and group?
faq1_a: Anytime, between packs. We'll move you over without losing your notes or your coach context.
faq2_q: What's actually different between one-on-one and group?
faq2_a: One-on-one: 60 minutes, just you and your coach, focused on what you need. Group: 90 minutes with 2–5 members at a similar place, real practice, lower per-session cost.
faq3_a: Then this is where to start. The whole point is to use what you already have. Your coach meets you where you are, not where a textbook says you should be.
faq4_q: What if I miss a session?
faq4_a: Reschedule within your pack. We don't penalise life happening. Just give us 24 hours notice when you can.
faq5_q: Do you do this for teams?
faq5_a: Yes. Tailored programs with reporting your leadership will read. See the team tab above to start the conversation.
fomo_scarcity_1on1: A small number of new 1:1 spots open each week.
fomo_scarcity_group: The next group cohort starts soon.
fomo_urgency: Most members say the same thing after their first session: I should have started months ago.
